data.title: Enova International Announces $261M Asset-Backed Notes Offering
data.description:
Enova International ( (ENVA) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On March 7, 2025, Enova International announced that its subsidiary, OnDeck Asset Securitization IV, LLC, plans to offer $261,392,000 in Series 2025-1 Fixed Rate Asset-Backed Notes through a private securitization transaction. The proceeds will be used to purchase small business loans from OnDeck, which will serve as collateral for the notes. The transaction, expected to close around March 20, 2025, aims to enhance OnDeck’s ability to support small businesses while not being guaranteed by Enova or OnDeck.

More about Enova International

Enova International, Inc. operates in the financial services industry, primarily focusing on providing online lending solutions. Its subsidiary, OnDeck, specializes in originating and purchasing small business loans, which are used as collateral in securitization transactions.

YTD Price Performance: -6.50%

Average Trading Volume: 251,204

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: $2.29B

data.title: Purebread Brands Inc. Announces Debt-to-Equity Conversion and Share Consolidation
data.description:
An announcement from Coho Collective Kitchens Inc ( (TSE:BRED) ) is now available.

Purebread Brands Inc. has announced a significant financial restructuring, converting $5,577,570 of debt into equity and implementing a 5-for-1 share consolidation. This strategic move aims to strengthen the company’s balance sheet, reduce leverage, and enhance shareholder value, positioning Purebread for future growth opportunities and improved marketability of its stock.

More about Coho Collective Kitchens Inc

Purebread Brands Inc. is a leader in fast-casual cafe and bakeries in British Columbia, focusing on retail expansion in vibrant communities across Canada and beyond. The company is dedicated to crafting exceptional food experiences and positively impacting the communities it serves.

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

data.title: Petrobras Announces Board and Fiscal Council Nominations
data.description:
Petroleo Brasileiro SA- Petrobras ( (PBR) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 13, 2025, Petrobras announced the nominations for its Board of Directors and Fiscal Council, ahead of the Annual General Meeting scheduled for April 16, 2025. The nominations include candidates from both the Federal Government, as the controlling shareholder, and minority shareholders. These appointments are subject to the company’s governance procedures and will be reviewed by the Eligibility Committee and the Board of Directors. The announcement reflects Petrobras’ ongoing efforts to maintain transparent governance and engage its stakeholders in the decision-making process.

More about Petroleo Brasileiro SA- Petrobras

Petróleo Brasileiro S.A. – Petrobras is a Brazilian petroleum corporation primarily engaged in the oil and gas industry. The company is involved in the exploration, production, refining, and distribution of oil and gas products, with a significant focus on the Brazilian market.

data.title: Vatic Ventures Closes First Tranche of Financing and Settles Debt
data.description:
The latest update is out from Vatic Ventures ( (TSE:VCV) ).

Vatic Ventures Corp. has successfully closed the first tranche of its private placement financing, raising $173,705 through the issuance of common shares and warrants. The proceeds will be used for general working capital, and the company has also settled $16,839 in debt by issuing shares to a creditor. This financing and debt settlement are expected to support Vatic’s ongoing operations and strategic focus on mineral exploration.

More about Vatic Ventures

Vatic Ventures Corp. is a mineral exploration and development company focused on acquiring and developing high-value properties. The company has options to acquire a 100% interest in the Solonópole South Lithium Property in Brazil and an 80% interest in the Opuwo Copper Property in Namibia.

data.title: Greenridge Exploration Launches MobileMT Survey at Sabre Uranium Project
data.description:
Greenridge Exploration Inc ( (TSE:GXP) ) has shared an announcement.

Greenridge Exploration Inc. has initiated an airborne Mobile MagnetoTellurics (MobileMT) survey at its Sabre Uranium Project in the Athabasca Basin, Saskatchewan. This survey, conducted by Expert Geophysics Surveys Inc., aims to map sub-surface magnetic signatures and detect conductive zones that may indicate uranium mineralization. The project is fully permitted for exploration activities until November 2027, and the company is actively engaging with local communities. The results of this survey are expected to aid in developing new drill targets, potentially enhancing Greenridge’s position in the uranium exploration sector.

More about Greenridge Exploration Inc

Greenridge Exploration Inc. operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of uranium projects. The company is engaged in identifying and advancing potential uranium resources, with a particular focus on the Athabasca Basin in Saskatchewan, Canada.

YTD Price Performance: -44.57%

Average Trading Volume: 99,316

Current Market Cap: C$25.08M

data.title: Petrobras Announces Key Shareholders’ Meetings for April 2025
data.description:
Petroleo Brasileiro SA- Petrobras ( (PBR) ) has provided an update.

Petrobras has announced its Annual and Extraordinary Shareholders’ Meetings scheduled for April 16, 2025. Key agenda items include the election of board members, analysis of financial statements for 2024, and amendments to the company’s bylaws. These meetings are crucial for determining the company’s governance structure and strategic direction, impacting its stakeholders and market positioning.

More about Petroleo Brasileiro SA- Petrobras

Petrobras, formally known as Petróleo Brasileiro S.A., is a Brazilian petroleum corporation. It operates in the oil and gas industry, focusing on the exploration, production, refining, and distribution of oil and gas products. The company is a significant player in the global energy market, with a strong presence in Brazil and international operations.

data.title: Beazley PLC Advances Share Repurchase Program with Latest Buyback
data.description:
Beazley ( (GB:BEZ) ) has shared an announcement.

Beazley PLC announced the purchase and cancellation of 357,000 of its ordinary shares as part of its ongoing share repurchase program. This move, facilitated by J.P. Morgan Securities, reflects the company’s strategy to enhance shareholder value and optimize its capital structure. Since the initiation of the program on March 5, 2025, Beazley has repurchased a total of 2,218,514 shares, indicating a significant commitment to returning value to its shareholders.

More about Beazley

Beazley PLC operates in the insurance industry, offering a range of insurance products and services. The company is known for its focus on specialty insurance markets, providing coverage for various sectors including professional indemnity, property, marine, reinsurance, and specialty lines.

data.title: GBL to Acquire 5% Stake in Sagard Holdings
data.description:
Groupe Bruxelles Lambert ( (GB:0IN2) ) has provided an update.

Groupe Bruxelles Lambert (GBL) has announced its agreement to acquire a 5% stake in Sagard Holdings Management Inc. through a capital injection by its subsidiary, GBL Capital Invest SCSp. The transaction, valued at US$33 million, is expected to close by the end of March 2025 and aligns with GBL’s investment strategy, which includes a commitment to invest €250 million over five years in Sagard-managed funds. The transaction has been evaluated by a committee of independent directors and deemed not to cause any harm to GBL, reflecting the quality of the Sagard platform and aligning with GBL’s strategic goals.

More about Groupe Bruxelles Lambert

Groupe Bruxelles Lambert (GBL) is a well-established investment holding company with a seventy-year stock market presence and a net asset value of €15.7 billion as of December 2024. As a prominent investor in Europe, GBL focuses on long-term value creation supported by a stable family shareholder base. The company aims to develop a diversified portfolio of high-quality listed, direct private, and indirect private investments, offering shareholders attractive returns through net asset value growth, sustainable dividends, and share repurchases. GBL is listed on Euronext Brussels and is part of the BEL20 index.

YTD Price Performance: 2.91%

Average Trading Volume: 40,298

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: €8.68B
